main.description: A decentralized, bottom-up claim of involvement in a media asset. This lives on the contributor's PDS.

assetRef.description: The AT-URI of the org.titlegraph.catalog.movie or series.

subject.description: The AT Protocol DID of the person or entity being credited.

role.description: The character name, department or job title (e.g., 'Director', 'Stunt Double', '"Sophia"').

name.description: The plain text name the user was credited under.
